caption: A man with long dark hair pulled back and wearing glasses performs on a stage. He is dressed in a white long-sleeved shirt, a black vest with blue floral embroidery, and a red and white patterned sash around his waist. He stands behind a microphone and plays a yellow electric guitar. Behind him are neutral-toned horizontal window blinds. In the foreground, the backs of several people's heads are visible as they watch the performance. The text "ORCA" appears in white capital letters on the right side of the scene. Throughout the clip, the man remains in position, shifting his facial expression and slightly moving his head and mouth as he sings into the microphone while continuing to play his instrument.
